scripts.dev:cf:auth: pnpm dev:cf:build && pnpm db:migrate:plan:local && pnpm db:seed:memberships:local && pnpm dev:cf
scripts.db:seed:memberships:local: mkdir -p ./.wrangler && node ./scripts/seed-campaign-memberships.mjs > ./.wrangler/campaign-memberships.seed.sql && wrangler d1 execute DB --local --file ./.wrangler/campaign-memberships.seed.sql
scripts.ops:a2:resolve:staging: test -n "$OP_FILE" && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env staging --file "$OP_FILE" || (echo 'Set OP_FILE=./scripts/operator-sql/identity-resolution.sql (copied/edited)' && exit 1)
scripts.ops:a2:resolve:prod: test -n "$OP_FILE" && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file "$OP_FILE" || (echo 'Set OP_FILE=./scripts/operator-sql/identity-resolution.sql (copied/edited)' && exit 1)
scripts.ops:a2:apply:staging: test -n "$OP_FILE" && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --env staging --file "$OP_FILE" || (echo 'Set OP_FILE=./path/to/operator.sql' && exit 1)
scripts.ops:a2:apply:prod: test -n "$OP_FILE" && wrangler d1 execute DB --remote --file "$OP_FILE" || (echo 'Set OP_FILE=./path/to/operator.sql' && exit 1)
